title: Resources

content:
Domain Information#Aodh is a realm of brutal, molten beauty. Its landscape is carved from towering basalt spires and active volcanoes, between which rivers of incandescent lava flow like slow, burning arteries. The air is perpetually warm and thick with the scent of soot and hot metal. Here, society is forged in the same fires as its legendary steel. The people—content, pragmatic, and fiercely hardworking—are master metallurgists and smiths. Their cities are not mere settlements but formidable fortresses of black stone, inlaid with veins of copper, brass, and gold wrested from deep mines. At the domain’s heart rises its greatest fortress, the Cathair nan Lasair (Seat of the Flames). This city-sized basalt spire is a monument of martial power, its walls threaded with gold and capped with gleaming spires. Piercing its very core is a massive golden sword—a permanent, dazzling testament to a past Prince’s god-slaying might, and a blunt reminder of the power that now resides there. For that seat is held by Ludvillia Beòlach, the youngest and most volatile of the Princes. Her rule is as direct and heated as her domain, her personal flame a constant spark in a land that is both a glorious forge and a powder keg awaiting her next impulsive command.
Ludvillia Art#PreviousNextExtra Images

title: Domain of Fire

content:
ImportantPlease, actually read the instructions in detail.
Server Overview#My self-hosted modded Minecraft server based on the Otherworld D&D Modpack. The pack features new world generation, a custom race/ class system, multiple questing systems, and more!
Installation#Whitelist#My servers always include a whitelist, in order to join you must submit your account name and UUID to me:
Find account name and inpput into a UUID finder Add me as a Frend on Discord: Krieger#0144 Send me the account name and UUID I will message when I have added you At this time I will send you the login information for the fileshare (described below) Prerequisites#Download and install the latest version of the Prism Launcher Launch Prism and sign in to your Microsoft account Download the modpack Inside Prism click the button in the top left corner that says Add Instance In the list on the right of the pop-up window click Import Click the Browse button and navigate to the location of whichever modpack you chose. Click the instance to launch it, the server should be added already but in the event it is not, the address is mcmod.kriegerhost.xyz Enjoy!#
title: Modded Server Information

content:
ImportantPlease, actually read the instructions in detail.
Server Information#A vanilla minecraft server for people who want a simpler experience. The modpacks below only add small QOL features and performance fixes. The server uses PurPur Minecraft as the backend.
Installation#Whitelist#My servers always include a whitelist, in order to join you must submit your account name and UUID to me:
Find account name and inpput into a UUID finder Add me as a Frend on Discord: Krieger#0144 Send me the account name and UUID I will message when I have added you At this time I will send you the login information for the fileshare (described below) Choosing a Modpack#flowchart LR A(Which Modpack?) -->B(Do I use a controller?) B -->|Yes| C(Vanilla Plus Controller) B -->|No| D(Vanilla Plus Normal) Prerequisites#Download and install the latest version of the Prism Launcher Launch Prism and sign in to your Microsoft account Download modpack one of the modpack options below. Both are nearly identicle except one has a mod that enables controller input. Vanilla Plus Controller Vanilla Plus Normal Inside Prism click the button in the top left corner that says Add Instance In the list on the right of the pop-up window click Import Click the Browse button and navigate to the location of whichever modpack you chose. Click the instance to launch it, the server should be added already but in the event it is not the address is mc.kriegerhost.xyz Enjoy!#
title: Vanilla+ Server Information

section: Lore Information for my Created Worlds
title: Earth

content:
World#Valik’thull is an ethereal plane that exists alongside and sometimes intertwined with other physical planes such as the one where Earth resides. It is a place of where magic is allowed to be more fluid. It’s people have long since known that ‘magic’ as its known is one of the fundamental building blocks of reality. This ethereal plane of existence is comprised of seven major domains that each have their own elemental affinities. Valik’thuul exists outside of the normal planes of existence, it is a place of raw magic that has not been distilled into matter. The Domain’s themselves have been forged and molded by the inhabitants of the world. The Seven Domains:
An Ciúnas Mór (Domain of Space) Sioraíocht (Domain of Time) Anam (Domain of Soul) Talamh (Domain of Earth) Aer (Domain of Air) Uisce (Domain of Water) Aodh (Domain of Fire) The Domains are relatively small bubbles of matter, they were created by previous Princes. These seven domains are each suited for the power of the each individual Prince. Outside of these domains is raw magic, the building blocks of everything. This area is untamed and wild, the only beings able to survive in it are powerful magic wielders. The Princes of Space, Time, and Soul have always been the dominant strengths. These three Domains form the ‘core’ tetrahedral of Valik’thuul’s inhabitable area, with the other four (Fire, Water, Earth, Air) Domains arranged around them in a diamond pattern. Each Domain has a discrete border, travel between them is facilitated by teleportation arrays that were created and maintained by the generations of Space Princes. Each of these domains are rules by a Prince (not all male), all seven eternally vying for the right to ascension into Godhood. In the history of Valik’thuul not a single Prince has managed to ascend. The Seven Domains are not typically in open and active war, but there are constant power struggles and political machinations. In terms of raw power the top three have similar potential, and the bottom four are typically squabbling amongst themselves. The domains and their ‘royal’ families do not have family names. They are distinguished by the power of their house and the magic in their bloodlines. Each prince is known simply as the Heir of their individual Domains until they come into their power and choose a name for themselves. A new heir has not been born in half a century.
Prince Ages#
